sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Sized larger to cover the concordance des temps fully. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'J'achète' (rapporter des paroles; le discours rapporté au passé et la concordance des temps). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
